story_arc: Create a cohesive first-person visual diary that feels cinematic, grounded, and alive. Turn the still images into intentional scenes instead of slideshow transitions.
visual_rules: Each shot must start from one source image and resolve into the next image in order.
Keep continuity between shot endings and the next shot beginnings.
Avoid abrupt cuts, abrupt morphs, and slideshow logic.
Prefer grounded motion that can plausibly connect the paired images.
narration_text:
I moved through the city slowly, letting each block tell me something new,
old stone, red lanterns, the smell of fruit, the hum of strangers.
Nothing dramatic happened,
just the quiet feeling of being here,
and realizing a simple day can stay with me longer than I expect.
